reviews.review_text: This is the greatest Star Wars game I have ever played. The base game has tons of excellent content & the campaigns are fun. The modding scene in the Steam Workshop is what takes this game to the next level, you can play in any galatic era with any navy or army you want. Clones Wars, Old Republic, New Republic, etc. The possibilies are endless, there is so much content for this game, this game is an MUST BUY for Star Wars fans.
One of my favorite RTS games I've picked up, the performance holds up well with fun cinematic gameplay and strategizing along with really fun mods that are easy to use.
best star wars rts game + active mod community. Best played with mods
My favorite RTS of all time that has enhanced and evolved my love for this game all over again because of the the Modding community

If you love Star Wars, and you love the RTS genre, this game manages, even now in 2026, to be fun in every way that matters. It is within the modding scene that it elevates to another level entirely, truly. 

The modders have poured their love into this title and it shows. They have pushed this game to the absolute limits, and it means playing with even the most obscure characters in a galaxy far, far away. For those with a deep love, there is nowhere else that you may find certain eras depicted in gaming at all, and for the satisfaction of that "what if?" urge, every victory can feel like an earned step to a fun reward, every campaign. 

And for campaigns? Modders have added fun missions that depict major moments across the books and movies, again heightening the original vision into something that leaves dreams manifest in hard-fought battles. 

I, for one, love certain niche eras, like the early Imperial era. There is no other title that even comes close to trying to depict this in RTS. And modders have my back. Playing as the CIS holdouts, in the submod titled "Dark Times", has been so much fun, that I could not imagine gaming without EaW in my library. Where else can the obscure rogues in Farstar, Gizor Delso, or General Rootrock of the Nosaurians resist the Empire until their dying breath? Death to the Empire, writ in loving lines of code that make this title worth playing for any fan of the franchise. There is a mod out there for you. Try it out!

when yo fleet does shi you didnt tell it to do
also PLEASE update the game so it utilises all my cores, the only reason we cant have 500 ship blockades is because the game is so old it cant split computes between cores, i dont give a ♥♥♥♥ abt the graphics just fix that and my life is yours
Ancient game but held together by a community of modders that make it what we all want
I just figured our how the tech tree worked for the empire. No idea how it works for the rebels. Great game tho.

> I pick the criminal faction feeling like being bad
> Notice that I can spread corruption to other planets to gain benefits
> That's cool, $$$ and I can hurt the Empire and Rebels for 1000 credits? SOLD
> Notice a corruption called "Slavery"
> Hmm. Wonder where this goes.
> Find out that I can start slave trade on Endor
> Finally revenge on those furry teddy bear bastards
> Unlock a unit that is just a half naked man with a burlap sack 
> Wtf? Sure I guess I can use this what does this even do?
> 3 men with sacks land, a civilian (rebel aligned) runs up and start shooting at my half naked men
> Suddenly 3 furry little bastards appear out of the burlap sacks and run straight towards the crowd
> BOOM
> All of the civilians are dead


10/10 would enslave ewoks again
(p.s. mods are pretty good too)
base game good, but mods much better, espicially since they add my man admiral trench
good base game, though mod makers have supported the game for so long and have been keeping this game alive with mods and updates
Me (MASSIVE STAR WARS FAN) sitting over here wondering why Chill Dill is on the Rebel team instead of multiple Yoda...
Great game. Period. Pretty decent successor to Rebellion. You should play it.
this is the game i needed to scratch that itch for Star Wars fleet combat and the Mods make it even better base game is great it has so many cool Mods 10/10
game is highly fun and i highly recommend it to others the mods for it make it even better
It was great 20 years ago, and it's great now. The modding community is incredible. If you've never played and you love Star Wars, you have to play this game.
It is nice to see a community that makes awsome content and that keep's an old game alive.

I have put several hundreds of hours into this game when it first came out. This game and Empire Earth 2 were my intro into RTS type games. I really wish there was a way to modify your unit capacity on Conquest mode. I only have experience with the base game so far and I hope to try out some mods down the line. 

After returning to play it after many years I can say it is a little rougher than my nostalgia remembers. I still love it though.

If you are picky about gameplay being perfect all I can say is don't play an older game. Just because I like it doesn't mean you will.
Very fun game with lots of potential. Wish it was remastered with more eras.
amazing how an old game like this one still makes for an excellent strategy game. recommended 10/10

i like strategy games and i like star wars so i knew id like this game -- this one was pretty straightforward and easy to understand but still fun and challenging :] I dont really find it that dated either it's just a simple strategy game
Fun game with a lot of good options I have around 380 hours in the bace game and have only started to mod.

One of the best RTS games ever made and my personal favourite would highly recomend Empire at War Expanded mods especially Thrawns Revenge and Fall of The Republic. After a playthrough of both (The New Republic for Thrawns Revenge and the Republic and eventually empire for fall of the republic) I can say both were incredible and are hard to believe they are made by fans!

the BEST Star Wars RTS of all time. Modding community is GOATED, still alive and active until now!!! No other game scratches the RTS itch while taking place in the Star Wars universe, managing the war on a Galactic scale + fighting battles for planets on their surface or in orbit. Awakening of the Rebellion and Awakening of the Clone Wars mods bring the game up to date with greatly improved graphics and very in-depth mechanics that are more fun and engaging than a lot of modern RTS' coming out right now.

For YEARS I was absolutely starving for a Star Wars RTS. I played Galactic Battlegrounds, and it was good enough. But collecting and managing resources just isn't my thing. Great game, but the resource management felt a bit too hands on for my liking.

I had NO IDEA this game existed! In terms of resource management, it is perfectly balanced. Just enough to have an impact on the game, but it doesn't overpower the combat. Speaking of combat, the space battles are absolutely stunning. They are GORGEOUS. I absolutely adore this game. I can't believe I went all these years without knowing about it.

If you like Star Wars, and if you like RTSs, don't hesitate.

Buy it and don't look back.

For a game published in 2006 it hold up pretty well, if you want to enhance the game I'd recommend mods like Fall of the Republic, and other mods by the same creator. Overall 9/10 game even for todays standard highly enjoyable.
Probably the best Star Wars strategy game out there. Really enjoyable. Has Steam Workshop too.
i love RTS games this is one of my favorites and it actually stays accurate to the old not Disney star wars lore.
An amazing game with a great modding scene.  A game perfect for any star wars fan with a preference for strategy.

Got into a 2 hour fight against the Republic on skirmish mode I had like one mining asteroid or two hardly making money and somehow holding out against a onslaught of Republic forces with like one Lucrehulk and maybe a dreadnought at a time till I found out how to actually capture the mining asteroids. Super fun game so far though I am new im having a grand time with it. Its way more simple to get into than games like HOI4 there is no resource gathering and annoying stuff like that. The combat in engaging and suspenseful it feels good to win. Would recommend!
This is a very fun game, espically when you're using the mods from the steam workshop. I'd say it's probably an 8/10 or so.

Mods revived this game and have made it amazing. Replayability is almost infinite with AI that can be different in every campaign and different heroes to use. Base game is alright by normal standards but mods are where this game lives now.
Best Star Wars RTS ever made. Mod scene is amazing and the depth of gameplay is still unmatched.
Great game, I used to play this. I got rank 1 in the expansion many years ago. Re-downloaded after I found out it was on steam.

Only recommended if you're planning to play with mods, base game is very outdated.

Also may require some tinkering to actually launch it, as the newer hardware/drivers seem to have some problems. (Running steam in admin mode helped me, but not sure how it will work for others.)

Respect to modders who still mod 20+ year old game with quite impressive results.
This game holds up so well. You wouldnt be able to tell its age from just playing the game. The modding community is also amazing updating and making new mods all the time. 10/10 game would recomend
5 Hours in and its a great game. Looks confusing but really isnt at all. For a 2006 game its really good.

P L A Y  I T
This game has mods that have been continuously updated for TWENTY YEARS STRAIGHT!
Base game is awesome, but mods take it to a whole new level
brilliant game, complex game mechanics that work well
Great Game! with all the mods you can add to it, you can have a different experience every time you play
first rts that ive gotten into, very good game with a tutorial that explains the mechanics well and the battlecam is dope
the mods that you can use, make this game so much more fun almost endless ways to play
It may seem as an old game. But I promise if you like fleet command games and star wars, you will love this. It has extremely fun game modes.

This game is 20 years old at the time of this review but it's still great. It has phenomenal support from the devs and somehow it's still receiving the occasional yearly update to adjust backend stuff for modders. If you pick up this game, it's still great for its vanilla gameplay but it becomes even better when you play the various mods available for it, such as Republic at War, or my personal favorite, Empire at War Expanded: Thrawn's Revenge, which covers the various Expanded Universe factions from the timeline stretching from 4 ABY to 22+ ABY. More than 90% of my playtime is spent in Thrawn's Revenge. The Expanded mods also include separate mods for Fall of the Republic for the Clone Wars era (a different spin on Clone Wars compared to Republic at War, with different mechanics) and Revan's Revenge for the Old Republic era.

If you're sick of Disney Star Wars and you want to re-experience Star Wars as it was meant to be enjoyed, pick up this game. Play the vanilla version first, then the Forces of Corruption expansion, and then finally spend hundreds of more hours like me playing in the gigantic Star Wars sandbox that is the modding scene.
It's a very good game with excellent modding capabilities, would definitely recommend to people who enjoy Star Wars or RTS-style games.

this game is old however is timeless a great and fun game from the base to mods i have never sean a game like this before or today would love a sequal to this game or more expansion or updates would reconmend playing this great game game :)100%
Not as good graphics as the newer games obviously however for me much more enjoyable!
The mods are amazing, the gameplay and format are also amazing. Best game of its time and it continues to get better
Great game, and a great modding community

The greatest star wars game of all time, one of the greatest strategy games of all time. If you are autistic, enjoy good lasers, and want to command massive fleets of star wars ships and armies, then this game is for you. 

Thrawns Revenge and Republic at War are essential mods you should download after learning to play.

severely slept on 
base game is mid to good but mods are a huge boost
definitly play this game with mods
This game is very good for Large Scale Battles in space and ground. Any Star Wars fan would love this game
This is an immersive classic that represents star wars best. If you are a star wars nerd, this game is a go to.

Worth it for the mods if you get it on sale. Awakening of the Rebellion goes hard, and a lot of people seem to like Thrawn's Revenge too. I personally wouldn't spend $20 on the game, but it goes on sale for $5-$7 every now and then. The base game isn't worth playing in my opinion when compared to the mods.

I haven't played a second of the base game but the modding scene is so extensive it's like buying 10+ games in one. The studio maintaining the game takes recommendations from the major mod teams for important bugfixes and qol changes, even 20 years after release.

Up there among one of the best games to come out of this franchise. Really solid RTS all around. The ground battles are a little weaker than the space battles but all in all well worth it to give it a try if this is a genre and setting you like.

My only real knitpicks are that the AI can play like a rat bastard sometimes. Sending ridiculous doomstacks at you, which can be annoying. Also the Zann Consortium tends to be pretty OP, some questionable balancing going on with that whole DLC.

Aside from that, no notes.
Star Wars - Age of Empires made before the sequel trilogy but after the Heir to the Empire series was released. Holds up surprisinggly well in 2026. Good Mods available, still sweet without them tho

One of the all time longest running games. 20 years. Occassional updates from the developer on the steam version and a huge community of mod designers creating new and varied content. A great game of choice for Star Wars enthusiasts, real-time-strategy fans, and mod designers.
It is an amazing games with tons of community help and i love every bit of it.
Its a great game for star wars fans the control are kinda tricky but once you get them down its easy
I used to play this game as a child, and it remains one of my favoites. doubly so with the workshop and mods.
One of the beat star wars rts games since the age of empire versions. The space battles are cinematic.
Really great strategy game, lots of opportunity for development, battle planning and realistic execution.

it's a great game on it's own especially for it's time and the community have done wonders to produce mods for the game that have got me and probably many others to keep coming back to the game and I love how the devs helped by changing the code so that the community can do more. honestly one of the best purchases i've ever made.

Endless replayability. Make a sequel trilogy actually worth a damn with mods like Thrawn's revenge, relive the Rebelion with Empire at War Remake, rewrite the prequels with Fall of the Republic. and so much more.
For an old game it still holds up well and is well loved with the amount of mods that still being made for
This is a old game but you will get countless hours of fun with this game with mods or without great star wars fun

Super fun game,  Amazing with mods. it can be a bit difficult at times but some of the best parts are when you win while the odds are against you. ground battles lowkey mid, but the space combat is SO peak

An rts that actually feels star wars 
unlike galactic batlegrounds this isn't just a regular rts with a star wars skin it's actually fun too!
I love the mods for this game but after a while a little green guy shows up on my screen and takes all my credits would reccomend

This game is THE star wars strategy game. The devs gave the community the modding capability to keep this gem alive for over 20 years now. Do not be fooled about the age, at most a couple quick videos or google searches should be enough to run any mod off of the steam workshop. Somehow, someway, they did this game RIGHT.
The game is good, the incredible modding scene elevates it to an all time classic.

Original game: great, worth replaying.
Thrawn's Revenge - the absolute best
Its a great game with a great community and wonderful mods 10/10
good game. definetly need mods in order to enjoy it fully. fall of the republic or thrawns revenge are the best

This is still the best Star Wars strategy game on the market. It offers amazing base game play and space combat as well as a strong community creation effort. If you like RTS and Star Wars this is the best one out there.

Star Wars Empire at War may be an older RTS title, but it is one of the greatest Star wars/ RTS games I have ever played in general.  With it having one of the best most thriving mod comunitys I have ever seen, with mods such as Fall of the Republic, and Thrawns Revenge overhauling the mod to put you is those respective eras.
In my boom it is an (10/10) very fun experince.
While the base game is very dated the heavy modding comunity gives this game so much life.
This game i great for any star wars fan and mods just make it so much better
A classic Star Wars RTS. Base game is fun with some jankiness, but is enhanced with some extremely well made mods.
Joe Biden wouldn't beat a b1 battle droid in checkers. Moral of the story use mods and the game becomes alot more fun. Remember makes sure to eat yo veggies.
Been playing this game since it came out on disk, one of my all time favorites. the modding community also helps breath new life into this game on a regular basis.
One of the best RTS games of all time. The steam supported mods are incredible too.
This was a great game capturing many aspects of real-time strategy across multiple worlds with mods to play as well. The downside is a weakness in diplomatic options.

I quite enjoy the game with the space combat although I do dislike ground combat its not bad I just prefer the space battle more

It's a Star Wars RTS game, play it if you like Star Wars and RTS.

Incredible modding community, shoutout Thrawn's Revenge
My father liked this game so much that he played this game for 15 years. This game make my father a huge starwar fan

very nostalgic and good with mods
Its great you can completely feel immersed in this game i recomend using mods
very good rts for star wars with mods like fall of republic or thrawns revenge
the best star wars rts, maybe the best rts ever?
